form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.49) when fifth over 295m at this track in a Class 4. Has four successes and 14 minors from 24 starts from box 2. Key player.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by half a length at this track over 295m (16.96) beating Rovaniemi in Class 4 on April 2. Has scored three times from this draw. Expected to go well.
